name: Cartoon Mini Racing
author: Poki
description: Vroom vroom! Pick your colorful car and get racing! Zoom over roads, bridges, mountains, and more as you try to beat the competition in this fun car racing game. Finish first to unlock new levels and buy new vehicles to increase your speed! Grab a friend and try out the two-player racing mode. Winner gets bragging rights! Controls: Arrow keys - Steer H - Reset car
